phrases.intent_en: Ask how to cross to the Oltrarno from the historic center
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si raggiunge l'Oltrarno dal centro?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see raj-JOO-njeh lol-TRAR-noh dal CHEN-troh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Oltrarno — literally 'beyond the Arno' — is Florence's artisan and bohemian left bank, reached via the Ponte Vecchio or Ponte Santa Trìnita.

responses.english: Straight on, Piazza Pitti is nearby.
responses.phonetic: SEM-preh DREET-toh, PYAHT-tsah PEE-tee eh kwee vee-CHEE-noh.
responses.french: Sempre dritto, Piazza Pitti è qui vicino.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find artisan workshops
phrases.text_local: Scusi, ci sono botteghe artigiane qui?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, chee SOH-noh bot-TEH-gheh ar-tee-JAH-neh kwee?
phrases.cultural_note: The Oltrarno is Florence's traditional craft quarter — goldsmiths, bookbinders, restorers and leather workers still work here.

responses.english: Yes, many on Via Maggio and Via dei Serragli.
responses.phonetic: see, MOL-teh een VEE-ah MAJ-joh eh VEE-ah day ser-RAH-lyee.
responses.french: Sì, molte in Via Maggio e Via dei Serragli.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where a good aperitivo bar is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un bel posto per l'aperitivo qui?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon bel POS-toh per lah-peh-ree-TEE-voh kwee?

responses.english: Yes, Rasputin or Mad Souls on Borgo San Frediano.
responses.phonetic: see, ras-POO-teen oh mad sowls, een BOR-goh san freh-DYAH-noh.
responses.french: Sì, Rasputin o Mad Souls, in Borgo San Frediano.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the Boboli Gardens
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si accede ai Giardini di Boboli?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see at-CHEH-deh ay jar-DEE-nee dee BOH-boh-lee?

responses.english: The entrance is at Palazzo Pitti, separate ticket.
responses.phonetic: leen-GRES-soh eh ah pah-LAHT-tsoh PEE-tee, beel-YET-toh seh-pah-RAH-toh.
responses.french: L'ingresso è a Palazzo Pitti, biglietto separato.
